1 November 2023

Dr. Wong Li Ming  
123 Innovation Drive  
Singapore 567890  

Dear Dr. Wong,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 198765432Z). You will report directly to Mr. Tan Wei Ming, our Head of Research. Your employment will commence on 15 November 2023.

Your starting salary will be SGD 8,500 per month, subject to standard statutory deductions. As part of your benefits package, you will also receive health and dental insurance, as well as a performance bonus at the end of the fiscal year.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning a copy of this letter by 8 November 2023. You may reach us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@quantumdynamics.sg for any queries.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Yours sincerely,

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Human Resources Director  
Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd.  
NRIC: S7654321B  
Contact Number: +65 6789 0123  
Email: siti.abdullah@quantumdynamics.sg
